overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing the character Franklin walking along a rocky and sandy lakeshore on a clear sunny day. The character picks up a ball, continues along the beach, enters the water to swim, and approaches a beached motorboat in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal path with scattered debris

events.description: character picks up green ball from ground near inflatable raft

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shoreline, passing an abandoned tire and inflatable boat, picking up a green ball

entered.detail: steep rocky terrain forming the left boundary of the path
black rubber tire lying on the rocky ground
red and black inflatable boat beached on the shore
distant mountain peaks visible across the lake
calm blue lake water along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky coastal path with steep cliffs on the left and the lake on the right. An abandoned tire and inflatable raft are visible on the ground. The character picks up a green ball near the raft while distant mountains are visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with scattered pine trees

events.description: terrain transitions from rocky path to sandy beach with more vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoreline as the ground becomes sandy, passing small bushes and pine trees

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the beach
low green shrubs scattered across the sandy terrain
light-colored sand replacing the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a sandy beach with scattered pine trees and bushes replacing the rocky terrain. The character continues walking along the shore as the ground becomes softer and more vegetation appears. The rocky cliffs recede into the distance.

events.description: character enters the water, transitioning from walking to swimming
red and white motorboat becomes visible beached on the shore ahead

agents.ego_description: wading into the clear shallow water, swimming briefly, then walking through the water toward a beached boat

notable_agents.action: red and white motorboat beached on the sandy shore, stationary

entered.detail: red and white speedboat resting on the sandy shore at the water's edge
large rocks visible beneath the clear water surface

segments.scene_description: The character enters the clear shallow water and begins swimming. The sandy bottom and submerged rocks are visible through the water. A red and white motorboat comes into view beached on the shore ahead as the character approaches it through the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal shoreline that transforms from a rugged rocky path into a sandy beach and finally into the clear waters of a lake. It begins with the character walking beside steep cliffs and picking up a green ball near an abandoned tire and inflatable raft. As the rocky terrain gives way to a sandy beach, the cliffs recede into the distance and the landscape shifts toward scattered pine trees and coastal bushes. The scene then transitions as the character leaves the shore to enter the shallow water, revealing the sandy bottom and submerged rocks below. Finally, the camera follows the character swimming forward as a red and white motorboat beached on the distant shore comes into full view.
